question: What are the names of all the clients, and how many times has each of them ordered?
sql: SELECT Client.Name, COUNT(Orders.IdOrder) FROM Client LEFT JOIN Orders ON Client.IdClient = Orders.IdClient GROUP BY Client.IdClient;
